title: Smoky Smoked Vietnamese Prawns Stir-fry
description: A smoky, tender, lazy-sunday vietnamese dish featuring tiger prawns that is both vegetarian-friendly and gluten-free.

ingredients.name: 1 lb (450g) tiger prawns
ingredients.notes: ensure they are fresh and have been deveined

instructions: Place the prawns in a bowl and combine with soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, minced garlic, sesame oil, and smoked paprika. Mix well until the prawns are evenly coated.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the sautéed mix of prawns to the pan and stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes or until the prawns turn pink and cook through.
Remove the prawns from the pan and set aside. In the same pan, add a bit more oil if needed and add the chopped cilantro. Stir and toss until wilted slightly.
Add the lime juice to the pan and stir-fry for about 30 seconds. Return the prawns to the pan and mix them in with the cilantro, ensuring they are evenly coated with the sauce.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
